description: Transform your cooking experience with our premium air fryer silicone liners, crafted from thick, high-quality food-grade silicone. These non-toxic liners are designed to last, resisting scratches and wear while ensuring safe cooking for you and your family. Say goodbye to disposable parchment paper; our reusable silicone liners are an eco-friendly choice that not only reduces waste but also saves you money in the long run. With a top diameter of 7.9 inches and a bottom diameter of 6.9 inches, these liners perfectly fit 3.8L-5L air fryers, including popular brands like Tower, Ninja, and COSORI. Enjoy hassle-free cooking as they enhance your culinary adventures by providing a non-stick surface that prevents food from sticking or burning. Cleaning is a breeze—simply flip the liners inside out and wash them with warm water, or toss them in the dishwasher for effortless maintenance. Versatile and multifunctional, our silicone liners can also be used in microwaves, ovens, barbecues, and steamers, making them an essential addition to any kitchen. Elevate your cooking game with our durable and flexible silicone air fryer liners, and make every meal a delightful experience.
